languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

languages.text: "Да ты смеешься, булыжник? Они же все потомки штрафников! От твоих надзирателей места мокрого не останется".
"Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

"Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

languages.text: 「冗談言ってるの、キルジョイ様？みんな刑務兵の子孫よ！あなたが送った監督官は、肉じゃがにされてしまうわ。」
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

traits.locale_text: 「冗談言ってるの、キルジョイ様？みんな刑務兵の子孫よ！あなたが送った監督官は、肉じゃがにされてしまうわ。」

languages.text: « C'est une blague, maître Rabat-joie ? Ces gens sont les descendants de soldats pénaux ! Ils réduiront en charpie tous les surveillants que vous leur enverrez. »
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

traits.locale_text: « C'est une blague, maître Rabat-joie ? Ces gens sont les descendants de soldats pénaux ! Ils réduiront en charpie tous les surveillants que vous leur enverrez. »

languages.text: "Soll das ein Scherz sein, Meister Killjoy? Sie sind allesamt Nachkommen von Strafsoldaten! Sie würden aus jedem Aufseher, den Ihr da runter schickt, Hackfleisch machen."
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

traits.locale_text: "Soll das ein Scherz sein, Meister Killjoy? Sie sind allesamt Nachkommen von Strafsoldaten! Sie würden aus jedem Aufseher, den Ihr da runter schickt, Hackfleisch machen."

languages.text: "Şaka mı yapıyorsun Oyunbozan Efendi? Hepsi mahkûm askerlerin soyundan geliyor! Aşağı göndereceğin gözetmenlerin hepsini kıymaya çevirirler."
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

traits.locale_text: "Şaka mı yapıyorsun Oyunbozan Efendi? Hepsi mahkûm askerlerin soyundan geliyor! Aşağı göndereceğin gözetmenlerin hepsini kıymaya çevirirler."

languages.text: «¿Está de guasa, maese aguafiestas? ¡Si son descendientes de legionarios penales! Harán picadillo a cualquiera que mande para supervisarlos».
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."

traits.locale_text: «¿Está de guasa, maese aguafiestas? ¡Si son descendientes de legionarios penales! Harán picadillo a cualquiera que mande para supervisarlos».

languages.text: “你在开玩笑吗，泼冷水大师？他们可都是判罪军人的后代！你派去的监察员怕是会被他们剁成肉泥。”
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Master Killjoy? They're all descended from penal soldiers! They'll make mincemeat of any overseers you send down."
